issue_title: [BUG] - Infinity request execution when scrolling to the end of the dropdown to load more
issue_body_preview:
### Description

In the dropdown fields, when the user scrolls to the end of it to load more, it starts sending requests indefinitely.

### Screen recording.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5a34524b-6a6d-4beb-8f78-5d0ccda19b07

 

### Reproduction URL

N/A

### Reproduction steps

```bas
test_description_zh: 在包含下拉选择字段的表单页面中，打开一个支持分页加载的下拉菜单，滚动到下拉列表底部触发加载更多数据，观察网络请求行为和下拉菜单的表现。
expected_result_zh: 滚动到下拉菜单底部时，应仅触发一次加载更多的请求，加载完成后新数据正常追加到列表中；不应出现无限循环发送请求的情况，下拉菜单保持正常可交互状态。
